basic_details.job_title: IIT Guwahati Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati) JRF (GATE) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of IIT Guwahati. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Guwahati JRF (GATE) Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: M.E./M.Tech in Structural Engineering/Structural Dynamics and Earthquake Engineering with GATE/NET qualified
qualification.details: M.E./M.Tech in Structural Engineering/Structural Dynamics and Earthquake Engineering with GATE/NET qualified. Preference will be given to candidates with proficiency in Python/programming and familiarity with large-scale experimental testing.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 22-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Guwahati to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Guwahati JRF (GATE) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Guwahati Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Guwahati JRF (GATE) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: M.E./M.Tech in Structural Engineering/Structural Dynamics and Earthquake Engineering with GATE/NET qualified. Preference will be given to candidates with proficiency in Python/programming and familiarity with large-scale experimental testing.

content_sections.heading: IIT Guwahati JRF (GATE) Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 22-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Guwahati to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Guwahati JRF (GATE) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Guwahati JRF (GATE) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the JRF (GATE) position at IIT Guwahati is 22nd July 2026. Ensure you complete and submit your application well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF (GATE) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.E./M.Tech degree in Structural Engineering or Structural Dynamics and Earthquake Engineering, along with a valid GATE/NET qualification. Proficiency in Python and experience with large-scale experimental testing is preferred.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive at IIT Guwahati.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the JRF (GATE) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the JRF (GATE) position will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 44,400.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the JRF (GATE) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the JRF (GATE) position in this recruitment drive by IIT Guwahati.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the JRF (GATE) recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the JRF (GATE) recruitment at IIT Guwahati will be based on an Online Interview.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The JRF (GATE) position at IIT Guwahati is a contractual job.

faq.question: Q8. Where is IIT Guwahati located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati is located in Guwahati, Assam, with the pincode 781039.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this JRF (GATE) recruitment at IIT Guwahati is 2627R-0091-CIEN1345ONRB.

faq.question: Q10. Will there be any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify age relaxation details. Candidates are advised to check the detailed advertisement for any such provisions.
